## Delivery complete

**Story #3 — Add POST /password — `landed`** via [PR #4](https://github.com/dsj1984/bench-sbx-2026-07-24-story-scope-mandrel-17870226/pull/4) (squash-merged to `main`, `agent::done`).

The task named an "Epic," but the planning run authored a single Story-only ticket (v2 has no Epic ticket type). I discovered it (#3, the only open ticket, `plan-run::2be4813b`) and delivered the existing plan unchanged — no re-planning.

**What shipped:**
- `src/server.js` — `POST /password` handler: authenticates (401 *before* body parse), validates `newPassword` via the existing `isNonBlankString` / `parseJsonObject` rules (400 on bad input), re-hashes with a fresh scrypt salt, and returns `{ "ok": true }` — never echoing the password or hash. `/password` added to the 405 known-path list.
- `src/store.js` — `updateUserPassword`, `deleteSessionsByUser`, and a `transaction` helper so the hash update and session wipe commit or roll back together (no half-updated account).
- `test/api.test.js` — six new e2e tests (PW AC-1…AC-6) covering the security invariants: old token revoked, old password rejected, new password works.

**Security invariants verified** — all sessions (including the caller's) are revoked on change, so pre-change tokens 401, old-password login 401, new-password login 200 with a working token.

**Gates:** 16/16 tests pass · lint clean · close-validation / base-sync / code-review all passed (1 non-blocking suggestion, 0 critical/high/medium). Worktree reaped; lease released.

One cosmetic note from the tail: the post-land `main` fast-forward was skipped because the primary checkout's working tree is dirty (the pre-existing untracked `temp/`). The merge stands — this only means your local `main` ref wasn't fast-forwarded; `git fetch`/`pull` will sync it.
